title: 30o: blob_lookup None type_names wire behavior undocumented
description: crates/jmap-chat/src/methods/blob.rs line 44-45: the doc comment says 'None queries all types registered on the server' but does not mention that None serializes as JSON null in the typeNames field (not an omitted field). If the server treats null differently from an absent field, this matters for callers. The doc should state the wire encoding or note whether the server treats null as 'all types'.
close_reason: design decision: None type_names documented in method doc comment
